items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC1 Available
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 has now moved from beta into Release Candidate status.

This update improves the Flash Mr. Fusion experience with fixes for false error messages, improved drive detection on Windows, and prevents Windows Explorer from opening unexpectedly during the flashing process.

The Flash Mr. Fusion tab has also been moved to the first position as this is usualy the first step.

You can download the latest release candidate below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
